entry.title: 你好
entry.content: 123456#include <iostream>using namespace std;int main(){ int s;} 1a^{n} $\alpha$ $$\alpha$$ $$f_{x}$$ $$\sum_{i=1}^{n}i=\frac{n(n+1)}{2}$$ $$\cos 2\theta & = & \cos^2 \theta - \sin^2 \theta \ & = & 2 \cos^2 \theta - 1.$$ $$lim_{1\to+\infty}P(|\frac{1}{n}\sum_i^nX_i-\mu|<\epsilon)=1, i=1,…,n$$ 123456789#include <iostream>using namespace std;int main(){ while(true) { cout<<"sdfsdfsd"<<endl; }} 逻辑上的佛蛇妃为防范措施为i访问过覅i给外国人价格vi飞过我就撇号v都是vi给地方四个频道大方不大方比赛结果是vsv反倒比大方不大方【吧
